input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('market.csv')
row = df[df['qid'].astype(str) == '774274']
if len(row) > 0:
    r = row.iloc[0]
    print(f'Q{r[\"qid\"]}: {r[\"title\"]} | Market: {r[\"market_aggregate\"]}')
"
